---

name: build-website

description: Generate a directory structure for a new website project. Use when: building a new website, creating project structure for web development.

parameters:

  type: The type of website (e.g., restaurant, blog, e-commerce)

---

Generate a proposed directory structure for a {type} website in markdown filetree format.

Include essential files like index.html, CSS, JS, and any specific to the type.

For example, for a restaurant, include menu.html, contact.html, etc.
